english translation text: Fatima’s cry was heard in the sky,O my Husayn! Hungry & thirsty for 3 days, my innocent Husayn
The cruelty that would shatter the solid rock He endured all that patiently, O my Husayn

urdu transliteration text:
O Khalilullah Ibrahim, come & see in Karbala Surpassed Ibrahim’s patience, my Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

english translation text: With what courage at his young son’s body. Pulled the spearhead from his chest, my Husayn
O that 6 months infant &the arrow of HurlamaHe bore the pain in his heart,O my Husayn
Sister Zaynab’s cry is enough to make you cry. Her eyes witnessed the slaughter of my Husayn
Fatima is mourning in Paradise with the Houris. His body was targeted by arrows, O my Husayn
Swords and spears coming from all sides. He was all alone surrounded by enemies, my Husayn
Karbala’s story is indeed red with blood Its end is Zaynab, its beginning is my Husayn
